titles: 미국 8억 vs 한국 4억 — 같은 은퇴인데 필요 자산이 절반인 이유 (4%룰 한국 적용 가이드)
"아버지, 2억으로 은퇴 가능할까?" — 한국은 4%룰이 아니다, 국민연금·주택연금까지 합친 진짜 은퇴 공식
FIRE 30대 은퇴 9억의 함정 — 50년 기준이면 3.5%로 낮춰야 한다, 시퀀스 리스크 해부

character_poses.1: REACT-05 설명 중(교수 모드) — 미국 8억 vs 한국 4억 황금 저울 강의
character_poses.2: INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 — 국민·주택·연금저축 3대 파이프 안내
character_poses.3: REACT-07 마무리 인사 — 시퀀스 리스크 경고 후 안전한 길 안내 인사

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 교수 모드(REACT-05). 중앙 똑똑이가 안경 쓰고 검지 들어 'listen up' 제스처. 좌우에 거대한 황금 저울 — 좌측 팬엔 거대한 달러 동전 산(미국 8억), 우측 팬엔 작은 한국 원화 더미 + 미니 한옥집 + 작은 통장 카드(한국 4억). 두 팬이 완벽히 균형. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, calm professional expression wearing small round glasses, one finger raised in a 'listen up' teaching gesture. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, half body shot. Surrounding the skunk: a large ornate golden balance scale, perfectly balanced with both pans level — the LEFT pan holds a tall mountain of glowing golden coin shapes representing 800 million won, the RIGHT pan holds a smaller modest stack consisting of a Korean won bill bundle, a tiny traditional Korean house figurine, and a small bankbook card all together representing 400 million won. Despite the visual size difference, the scale pans rest at exactly equal height. Soft golden lens flare illuminates the scale center. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 정면 응시 + 안내 손짓(INTRO-05). 좌측 똑똑이가 정면 보며 따뜻한 미소로 한 손 앞으로 안내. 우측에 3개의 황금 파이프가 한 황금 컵으로 합쳐지는 인포그래픽 — 각 파이프에 작은 아이콘(국민연금·주택연금·연금저축). 컵에서 황금 액체 흘러나옴. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: a clean infographic-style scene of three glowing copper-gold pipes converging from three different angles into a single ornate golden cup at the center, each pipe adorned with a distinct small icon (a flag-like national pension shield, a small house silhouette for housing pension, and a small bankbook for pension savings). From the golden cup, a smooth stream of warm golden liquid flows downward into a softly glowing pool. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle radial glow behind the cup. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 마무리 인사(REACT-07). 똑똑이가 한 손 흔들고 다른 손에 작은 하트, 따뜻한 미소. 똑똑이 뒤로 두 갈래 길 — 좌측 짧은 빨간 길(FIRE 9억 함정, 작은 빨간 X 표지), 우측 긴 황금 길(50년 12억 안전 길, 작은 황금 깃발). 가운데 작은 갈림길 표지판. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, warm gentle smile. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw waving warmly toward the viewer, the other paw holding a small heart shape. On the RIGHT side: a stylized two-path scene viewed from a slightly elevated angle — a shorter narrower red path on the left ending in a small red warning X marker representing the FIRE 900 million trap, and a longer wider golden path on the right extending into the distance with a small triumphant golden flag at its end representing the safer 50-year 1.2 billion path. A small wooden fork-in-the-road signpost stands at the junction. Background: deep navy blue gradient sky with golden bokeh sparkles and warm radial glow over the right path. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear path-choice contrast.
